use_cases: Display partner or customer logos for social proof on landing pages
Showcase trusted brands in a credibility section
Feature brand partnerships in a grid layout
Highlight technology stack or integrations used
Create a sponsor or contributor showcase section
ai_summary: A responsive logo grid display component featuring brand logos in a 2-4 column layout with decorative plus icon accents. Supports dark mode and alternating background colors for visual depth. Designed for social proof sections showcasing partners, customers, or technology integrations.
